name: Scary Huggy Playtime
description: Scary Huggy Playtime is a scary adventure online game for boys for free. You can choose different modes. As a human being, you are trapped in a scary house and face Huggy's pursuit. You need to constantly avoid it. You can also hide in different forms. Or as Huggy, you need to find all the hidden humans to succeed. You can feel different adventures in different modes and experience the real experience from the first perspective. It's time to take part in the game!
tags: 3D, Adventure, Android, Avoid, Boy, Brain, Escape, Fun, HTML5, Kids, Online, Puzzle, running
